steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Standard deviation is smallest when values cluster most tightly around the mean. Compare the range and spread of each dataset.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '44, 45, 47, 49, 50': range = 6, widest spread. ✗
  • Choice B — '45, 45, 47, 49, 49': range = 4, moderate clustering. ✗
  • Choice C — '45, 46, 47, 48, 49': range = 4, evenly spaced — no tight cluster. ✗
  • Choice D — '46, 47, 47, 47, 48': range = 2, three values identical at 47 — tightest cluster. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
